train.query: which project is the one-tap reorder flow for returning buyers
what lets a repeat shopper repurchase in a single tap
which project is guest checkout with no sign-in
what lets someone pay without creating an account
which project splits a charge across two cards
what lets a buyer pay with two cards at once
which project is buy-now-pay-later at checkout
what offers installment payments to shoppers
which project saves a card for one-click next time
what stores a card so checkout is one click later
which project applies store credit before charging a card
what spends account credit ahead of the card
which project lets you gift a cart for someone else to pay
what sends a basket to another account to settle
which project retries a declined card on a backup processor
what reattempts a failed charge through a second gateway
which project pre-authorizes and captures on shipment
what holds funds then charges when the order ships

test.query: the express single-tap re-buy path for existing customers
paying part on one card and part on another
spreading a purchase into scheduled installments
remembering a payment card for faster future checkout
drawing down store balance before the card is charged
handing a cart to a friend so they can pay for it
falling back to another processor when a card is declined
authorizing at order time and capturing at dispatch
